plugins.name: android-agp-9-upgrade
plugins.description: Upgrades, or migrates, an Android project to use Android Gradle Plugin (AGP) version 9. Do not use this skill for migrating Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) projects.

plugins.name: android-cli
plugins.description: Bootstraps Google's `android` CLI on developer machines and CI runners, keeps it fresh daily via a SessionStart hook, and provides migration guidance from legacy sdkmanager/avdmanager-based pipelines. Includes the `android-cli-setup` skill for local dev bootstrapping, the `android-cli-ci` skill for CI/CD setup (GitHub Actions, GitLab, CircleCI, Bitrise, Jenkins, Buildkite, self-hosted) with per-platform reference workflows and a sdkmanager migration guide, plus /android-cli-status, /android-cli-update, /android-cli-reset slash commands.

plugins.name: android-edge-to-edge
plugins.description: Use this skill to migrate your Jetpack Compose app to add adaptive edge-to-edge support and troubleshoot common issues. Use this skill to fix UI components (like buttons or lists) that are obscured by or overlapping with the navigation bar or status bar, fix IME insets, and fix system bar legibility.

plugins.name: android-migrate-xml-views-to-jetpack-compose
plugins.description: Provides a structured workflow for migrating an Android XML View to Jetpack Compose. This skill details the step-by-step process, from planning and dependency setup, to theming and layout migration, validation and XML cleanup. Use this skill when you need to migrate an XML View to Jetpack Compose in an Android project. It solves the problem of converting the UI of a legacy XML View into modern, declarative Compose components while maintaining interoperability.

plugins.name: android-navigation-3
plugins.description: Learn how to install and migrate to Jetpack Navigation 3, and how to implement features and patterns such as deep links, multiple backstacks, scenes (dialogs, bottom sheets, list-detail, two-pane, supporting pane), conditional navigation (such as logged-in navigation vs anonymous), returning results from flows, integration with Hilt, ViewModel, Kotlin, and view interoperability.

plugins.name: android-play-billing-library-version-upgrade
plugins.description: Use this skill when upgrading or migrating an Android project from any legacy Google Play Billing Library (PBL) version to the latest stable version of PBL.

plugins.name: android-r8-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyzes Android build files and R8 keep rules to identify redundancies, broad package-wide rules, and rules that subsume library consumer keep rules. Use when developers want to optimize their app's size, remove redundant or overly broad keep rules, or troubleshoot Proguard configurations.

plugins.name: github-utils
plugins.description: GitHub utilities for managing Dependabot PRs and other GitHub workflows
